query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_grades,
  SUM(CASE WHEN objectionHandling IS NOT NULL AND objectionHandling != '[]' AND objectionHandling != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_objections,
  SUM(CASE WHEN strengths IS NOT NULL AND strengths != '[]' AND strengths != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_strengths,
  SUM(CASE WHEN improvements IS NOT NULL AND improvements != '[]' AND improvements != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_improvements,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coachingTips IS NOT NULL AND coachingTips != '[]' AND coachingTips != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_tips,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_summary
FROM call_grades
